\tzpentry{ID3898}{Kaluza-Klein Action Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3898 introduces Kaluza-Klein Action Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \text{SNR} = \frac{|\mathcal{A}_{m_{KK}}|^2 \cdot Q \cdot V_{\text{mode}}}{\sqrt{4k_B T \Delta f \cdot Z_{\text{acoustic}}}} \end{equation}
